name: generate_for_labeled_block
description: Code should include a generate for loop with a labeled begin block to create an array of generated scopes.

name: dotted_reference_generated_array_scope
description: Code should include a dotted hierarchical reference that indexes into a labeled generate for block to access a signal inside the generated scope.

name: multi_level_module_instantiation
description: Code should include a chain of module instantiations forming a multi-level hierarchy where an intermediate module instantiates another module.

name: signal_inside_labeled_generate_block
description: Code should include a signal declaration inside a labeled generate for block so that the signal exists within each generated scope instance.

name: initial_block_hierarchical_access
description: Code should include an initial statement that performs a hierarchical dotted reference to assign or read a signal deep in the instance tree.
